old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.2.1","title":"Allowlist RPL multicast before replay","description":"Accept RPL control only for local unicast or ff02::1a; reject unrelated multicast before link replay consumption when destination is inspectable.","acceptance_criteria":"ff02::1a RPL control is accepted; unrelated multicast is ignored/rejected without consuming sender replay; application multicast membership remains outside RplStack.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-20T06:37:32.410555363Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-20T06:37:32.410555363Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.2.1","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-20T06:37:32.492410703Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Restricted inspectable RPL multicast to ff02::1a before link replay mutation and repeated the multicast gate after authentication, while preserving local L2 unicast transit forwarding and non-RPL application multicast. Added same-sequence replay regression. Full node suite and strict scoped Clippy pass.
